programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Butch Cassidy's Lost Loot
programme.desc: Josh immerses himself in Wild West lore on a quest to find Butch Cassidy's missing money. He traces the iconic outlaw's footsteps through Colorado, Utah and Nevada, eventually learning that he may need to find the man himself to locate the lost loot.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: With summer winding down, shiners are doubling their efforts to turn a quick profit. Tim Smith traverses the Atlantic on his quest to dominate the international shine market, but his pitch could be lost in translation.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Caved In
programme.desc: After coming to blows with Bill, Josh fears he may have finally gone too far. Patti and David aim to make up for lost time with a scorching new brew, but alarm bells have them running for the hills.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: It's the final weeks of summer and shiners are putting it all on the line. Tim must create a way to fill a massive international order and its judgment day in Virginia as Tickle puts on a brave face for court.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shine 'Til You Drop
programme.desc: The stakes get higher as shine season nears its end. Mark and Digger leave disaster behind for a new still site as Patti and David's jalapeno whiskey drives them to sell in unfamiliar territory.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Still Regretting
programme.desc: Josh is down his right hand and his right hand man. Snags at the distillery have production at a halt and Tim's future in jeopardy. Chico and Sandra set out on horseback for some mountain shining. Patti and David rush to run before hunting season begins.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Virgin Whiskey
programme.desc: Chico and Sandra are anxious to get back in the saddle and make their first run. Tim's behemoth tank might not be the ticket to fulfilling the Poland order after all. With Jim Tom by his side, Josh churns out a family heritage spirit.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Surthrive
programme.desc: An independent mother of three, plus a jungle savvy Green Beret, take on the remote wetlands of Guyana. Battling disease-carrying sand flies, venomous snakes, and an infestation of caiman present huge challenges.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: A special ops vet teams up with a single mom to fight torrential rains, flash floods and sickness in Thailand's Sai Rung River Valley. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before the river leaves them stranded from the crew.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A self-taught survivalist and an impulsive black belt take on the arid lakebeds of Nicaragua. The environment features a variety of deadly predators, but when one of them fails to pull their weight, it becomes clear their worst enemy could be each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Arachnid Overload
programme.desc: A survival-savvy yoga teacher and a custom knife maker tackle the brutal jungle of Colombia. Their primitive survival skills are impressive, but the deadly spiders and tics test both their courage and resilience, threatening to take them down.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a Special Forces veteran risk hypothermia at every turn as they take on Canada with no clothes. Bitter cold, torrential rain and wandering bears and moose make every night a struggle, and an obstinate chipmunk pushes their patience.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Edge of Madness
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on the hellish conditions of Guyana's equatorial savannah. Slammed from day one by the heat, they battle debilitating health issues, a team dynamic breakdown, critical survival malfunctions and a massive psychological decline.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Princess for a Day
programme.desc: Diva Latoya wants to walk down the aisle in a blinged-out ball gown. After months of chemo and currently cancer-free, Kristin is ready to marry her high school sweetheart.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Together as One
programme.desc: Meighan and Christina represent the newest kind of American family.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Taryn is a young bride who can't wait to buy a wedding dress. Denise has returned to the salon after four years to try on her wedding dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Rocker Brides
programme.desc: Kristin wants to find a rock 'n' roll, edgy wedding dress, while Lindsey, who's all about leather and lace, surprisingly decides on a softer wedding dress look.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Extreme Entourage
programme.desc: Melissa is a headpiece consultant at the store who is shopping for her wedding dress. Stella is having a Greek wedding and has brought along a big entourage. Carli is returning to the store for her final fitting after a challenging dress selection.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Family Rules
programme.desc: Tanya brings her outspoken family to help her find a blush-coloured dress. Mary Beth, who has ovarian cancer, is excited to dress shop with three generations of family members. Stella decides to bring only her mother to her first fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Cheetah Bride
programme.desc: Sabrina Bryan of 'The Cheetah Girls' has a dress-shopping date with designer Hayley Paige and one of Kleinfeld's own consultants is going to be a bride herself!

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Destinee's Story
programme.desc: Born as 'Matthew', Destinee never felt like she fit in. Now, having come out as a 600-pound transgender woman, she likes her curves, but she will need to say goodbye to them if she wants to be approved to transition completely.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Boat
programme.desc: Ken's entire world revolves around his girlfriend, but as years of hoarding have taken its toll on their relationship, she's giving him one last chance to clear out. Then, Lea is at risk of losing her children if she can't clean her clutter.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: You're Not Taking My Kids
programme.desc: When Child Protection Services removes Karen's children from her home, she is given just 48 hours to clean up or risks losing custody of her kids permanently.

programme.desc: Courtney and Eric struggle through a high-risk delivery. Six premature babies must survive the NICU and prepare to come home during a national flu crisis. One baby takes a turn for the worse, as the family faces nonstop feedings and mounting expenses.

programme.desc: A fight between Mellie's boyfriend, Skott and the father of her second child erupts while she's in labour. Later, the person who has been spreading rumours about all the ladies on a gypsy gossip site is revealed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fools in April/ Neptune's Spatula

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Hugs Rachel

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross' Denial

programme.desc: Rachel regrets asking Phoebe to jog with her when she attracts unwanted attention.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's Teeth

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Apothecary Table

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Joke

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Sister

programme.title: Mom: Black Mold and An Old Hot Dog

programme.title: Mom: Tush Push and Some Radishes

programme.title: Mom: Tantric Sex and the Sprouted Flute

programme.title: George Lopez: E.I.? E.I. OH

programme.title: George Lopez: Prescription for Trouble
programme.desc: When Carmen wants to go on birth control, George and Angie make a deal with her.

programme.title: Full House: Sisterly Love
programme.desc: D.J. is angry when Stephanie gets the part in a commercial that D.J. really had wanted.

programme.title: Full House: Half a Love Story
programme.desc: Jesse uses the baby to get a date with one of Danny's workers but the date is postponed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Something Smells/ Bossy Boots
programme.desc: Bob eats some sea-onion ice cream; Mr. Krabs' daughter makes some big changes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sharks vs. Pods/ CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Big Paw/ Pups Save a Hum-Mover

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Bears/ Pups Save a Farmerless Farm
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must work quietly to save the sleeping bears. / All the farmers are out of town.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Big News With Blue

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ready, Race, Rescue
programme.desc: The pups are ready to be the pit crew for their race hero, The Whoosh! When the legendary racer is unable to drive in the championship race, he calls on Marshall to take the wheel and race in his place.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Squirrels/ Pups Save a Roo
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol is on a roll when squirrels stash acorns in Alex's treehouse causing it to fall onto Daring Danny's skateboard. It's a switcheroo situation when a joey is separated from its mama. It's up to the pups to save a Roo and the day.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: ABC's With Blue
programme.desc: We are reading Blue's Clues to figure out what book Blue wants to read for story time. While looking for clues, we practice letter recognition and sound, help Mr. Salt & Mrs. Pepper with their grocery list and skidoo into a book.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mission PAW: Quest for the Crown

programme.title: The First 48: Murder in Pleasant Grove
programme.desc: In Dallas, a dismembered body is found burned in an open field. With no leads on the victim's identity, detectives turn to the public for help in solving this baffling case.

programme.title: The First 48: Graveyard Love
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a man is ambushed in front of his grandmother's house. Detectives suspect a woman close to the victim may have arranged the shooting, but they need hard evidence to prove it, and quickly before it's too late.

programme.title: The First 48: Run and Gun/ Lonesome Highway
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Det. Maggie Darling is on the hunt for the killers who gunned down a recent high school graduate. Then, in Dallas, Det. Steve David races to identify a woman found shot and dumped on the highway.

programme.title: The First 48: The Fighter/ Final Ride

programme.title: The First 48: 1000 Cuts/ Draw

programme.title: The First 48: Cruel Summer

programme.desc: Detective Barrere investigates when three men meet in a motel room in New Orleans east, and one of them ends up dead. Meanwhile in Tulsa, a man is stabbed 21 times when a night of drinking ignites a murderous rage.

programme.title: Live PD

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Back to the Big Dig
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reboots a living skeleton, an instant pet trap, a flipping mermaid and more, all with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Footloose
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q, and Sal call out bizarre names while working the front desk of an office, and tonight's loser gets up close and personal with some strange feet.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Back in the Day

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: E! News
programme.desc: Brand new interviews with Charlize Theron, Amy Schumer, Awkwafina and more!

programme.title: Movie: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman hires a free-spirited call girl to be his companion for a week. Slowly they draw things from each other and from within themselves that make them hope against their own sceptical nature for a fairy tale ending.

programme.title: Movie: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman hires a free-spirited call girl to be his companion for a week. Slowly they draw things from each other and from within themselves that make them hope against their own sceptical nature for a fairy tale ending.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Anchors Away
programme.desc: The girls try to come to terms with Miranda's new life with Brady; Carrie meets a sailor.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Unoriginal Sin
programme.desc: Samantha gets back together with Richard; Carrie has a dry spell in her love life.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Luck Be an Old Lady
programme.desc: The girls head to Atlantic City for a 'girls' weekend; Samantha can't trust Richard.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Cover Girl
programme.desc: Samantha offers to help Carrie with her book cover; Charlotte shops on-line.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Plus One Is the Loneliest Number
programme.desc: Samantha organizes Carrie's book-launch party; Miranda doesn't tell her date about Brady.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Return From Paradise
programme.desc: With only a few days left in paradise, Kendall and Kylie try to sort out their differences while Kim and Khloé help Kourtney try to forget Scott and get her mojo back. When the family returns home, a visit from Scott throws them all for a loop.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Big Launch
programme.desc: When Kourtney isn't ready for a big product launch in NYC, her sisters help her get her head in the game. Meanwhile, a very pregnant Kim accidently upsets her best friend Jonathan. Kim makes sure Kylie is making the most of her newfound opportunities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Knowing her family's history with cancer, Kris wants the girls to take a genetic test to know their risks, but not everyone is on board. Meanwhile Kendall struggles to find a balance in her relationship with Caitlyn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Miscommunication
programme.desc: Kris decides the family needs 'Communication Therapy,' but her plans backfire when she misses one of the sessions. Kylie is finally ready to celebrate her new home but her family's bossy ways get in the way of her plans.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family First
programme.desc: The girls recreate a legendary family video as part of Kris's epic 60th birthday bash. Meanwhile Khloé struggles to find a balance between supporting Lamar and returning to her daily life. Kendall worries that her family will get in the way of her dreams.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unforeseen Future
programme.desc: With her due date rapidly approaching and her baby breached, Kim learns that her house construction is delayed even further.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Out With the Old, In With the New
programme.desc: Even though things are changing for the Kardashian family in ways they never expected, they are determined to remember that family always comes first.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Aaron Carter joins us live to talk about his time on 'Marriage Bootcamp: Family Edition'. And we're discussing 'No Safe Spaces' with comedian Adam Carolla.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Is Fame an Addiction?
programme.desc: The seduction of fame and celebrity have long played a part in the desire to reach superstar status.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Does Hip-Hop Reject Women?
programme.desc: The history of hip hop has often been told through the eyes of the men who dominate the charts. But badass female rappers have been battling for equality since the beginning.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Who Is Kim Kardashian West?
programme.desc: Kim Kardashian West, arguably the most famous woman in the world, changed the face of social media. See how a reality TV star parlay her massive following into a billion-dollar business.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Full-On Fried
programme.desc: Four fried-food fanatics take on Guy's deep-fried games. First, they must use a special ingredient. Then they are challenged to create a dish with only foods starting in 'f.' Finally, Guy gets over-the-top fried dishes from the Fried Food Wheel.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Blue Plate Blues
programme.desc: Four chefs compete to see if one roll, spin or outrageous game will make or break their dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Music and Mayhem in the Market
programme.desc: The chefs must make their best dish using only ingredients that start with the letter S and it's not that simple! Next, they must prepare a lavish lunch that won't break their $10 budget.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Ggg Kids
programme.desc: Kids take on Flavortown after Guy Fieri invites four bite-sized chefs to play two huge games.

programme.desc: Two families return to GGG for more Flavortown fun in a three-round Thanksgiving family showdown. A member of each family pick from unidentified cans to determine the featured ingredient in their first meal.

programme.desc: Thanksgiving brings families together, so Guy Fieri has brought his DDD family to Flavortown Market for some good, old-fashioned Grocery Games fun.

programme.desc: Triple-G judges mentor three graduates of the Worth Our Weight culinary program for youth. The young chefs make a Thanksgiving feast only using what can fit in a cornucopia basket and a fall staple using the Fieri family's favorite ingredients.

programme.desc: Four chefs get their basters ready for this Thanksgiving episode. The chefs find autumn staples, which they must incorporate to their inventive fall dishes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Essential Cooking Tools
programme.desc: Ree finds some great tools at a local kitchen store to give as a wedding gift. As she purchases the tools, she shares some great dishes she can make with each.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Breakfast for Dinner, South of the Border
programme.desc: Rachael shows that breakfast for dinner doesn't have to mean pancakes and scrambled eggs. She whips up crave-worthy chilaquiles with a rich, red chile sauce made with Guajillo peppers for a satisfying kick.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Egg-zactly What You Want
programme.desc: Rachael makes Shaksouka, which is easier to make than it is to say. This savory Middle Eastern dish of tomatoes and eggs is typically served for breakfast, but the combination of spices, jalapeno and chipotle make it a hearty meal any time of day.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Comfort Food, Quick
programme.desc: Rachael skips the fuss of making a traditional chicken pot pie by whipping up her easy, stove-top version in half the time. She tops it with golden pieces of puff pastry for a fast and pretty finish to this bowl of comfort.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Roses Are Red, Vodka Sauce Is Pink!
programme.desc: Rachael proves that it pays to perfect the classics with this shrimp pasta and vodka sauce. Her easy sauce is both simple and sumptuous and adding shrimp elevates it to the perfect meal for a date night.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Don't Get Curried Away
programme.desc: The best thing about Rachael's chicken curry in a hurry with basmati is the homemade curry mix. She seizes the opportunity to experiment with curry flavor by making her own spice blend instead of using a store-bought one.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Have a Ball
programme.desc: Rachael's roasted meatballs with garlic bread taste just like Grandma used to make, but they come together in just 30 minutes. Rachael adds crusty, buttery garlic bread for an unbeatable home-cooked meal.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cleaning Out The Fridge
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cleaning out her fridge and using up food that's on its way out. She's turning milk and cream into a wonderful lemon rice pudding with leftover lemons, while the produce drawer is transformed into a cool, delicious fridge gazpacho.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Happy Birthday, Ladd
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking up a celebration dinner for her husband, Ladd's, birthday. There are delicious chili cheese burgers, crisp thin fries, a cowboy-friendly wedge salad with parmesan peppercorn ranch dressing and a towering yellow cake.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: How to Beat Bobby

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle of Brooklyn

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pot Calling the Kettle Beat

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Worst-Case Scenario

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bare Bones

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Monkey Business
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars take aim at a hat believed to have been worn by movie legend John Wayne. An etching that may have been done by Rembrandt and a classic 1950s clapping chimp are also up for grabs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Over the Top
programme.desc: A World War One helmet blasts into the shop. Corey and Rick are presented with a gun holster used on the long running TV show Gunsmoke.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bear-ly There
programme.desc: The team sets their sights on an 1870 Volcanic pistol. A World War II gas mask is found. An early 1900s life-sized Steiff bear prowls into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Close, But No Cigar
programme.desc: Ask not what your Pawn Stars can do for you, when the guys get a chance to own JFK's personal cigar box.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: The guys check out a collection of sex education records from 1948. Then, Corey and Chumlee check out a 'blue book' from the Las Vegas Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ponies and Phonies
programme.desc: Rick and Corey attempt to rope in a Bible believed to have been carried by Pony Express riders. Then, Corey attempts to get an R2D2 Pepsi machine that comes in the shop. Later, Lili's internship is up and the guys need to review her performance.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Chum System
programme.desc: A nightstick thought to have belonged to Ulysses S. Grant arrives at the shop. Then, Corey and Chum check out a vintage skateboard sticker collection. Chumlee tries to prove he is a master at multitasking.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Capture the Pawn
programme.desc: A rare 1589 book with the instructions for war and fortification, an 1840s chess table, a pair of antique door knockers, and a 1800s experimental rifle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of Fire
programme.desc: A model train once owned by Johnny Cash chugs into the shop, and a 1920s chicken incubator clucks on in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Napoleon Complex
programme.desc: A letter signed by Napoleon, a surreal Pedro Friedeberg figure, a 1960s Monkees talking puppet, and some original 'Dick & Jane' illustrations.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Every Rose Has Its Pawn
programme.desc: An original sketch of the Marine Corps War Memorial; a Poison platinum disc signed by Bret Michaels; a Roman oil lamp from the first century lights its way in; a Military certificate from the Vietnam War.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Samurai
programme.desc: Three Japanese samurai swords have Chum trying to cut a great deal. Corey pursues a Steiff donkey pull toy, while Rick looks over a British WWII propaganda poster and some significant thank-you letters.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Great Scott!
programme.desc: Rick receives an offer on a 1973 Marshall amp, with all of the original parts intact. A hoverboard signed by the cast of the 'Back to the Future' sequel floats into the shop towards Corey and Chumlee.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: President's Day Sale
programme.desc: Rick is after an autographed card of President Abraham Lincoln. Corey and Chum consider paying a hefty sum for a President Bill Clinton designed golf driver shaft, until discovering that he may not have used it himself.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawned and Confused
programme.desc: A seller brings his Led Zeppelin vinyl collection to Rick and Chum. A fancy 19th century office desk may be a worthwhile buy. A game-used base from the 2016 World Series could be a home run for the guys. Rick takes a trip to see 'The Object.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Who's Pawning With Me!
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee test out an old school 1960s Dune Buggy. Then, Rick jives with an original Jackson Five autograph that makes its way into the store. Plus, Chumlee drafts a new shop mission statement when he checks out props from 'Jerry Maguire'.

programme.desc: Nia, Tess and Booker are ecstatic over the popularity of their Chi-Lective music video that has gotten thousands of likes on MeTube, until Levi shows them a diss track that’s been posted by a rival group.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: General Nuisance
programme.desc: When Rachel's old army buddy, Robert, comes to stay with the family for a few days, his exhausting GI Joe-like personality rubs Blair and Byron the wrong way.

programme.title: Jessie: What a Steal
programme.desc: In an effort to help Ravi make friends, Jessie takes him to a MENSA meeting in the park. However, their new friends, Madeline and Scott, may be too good to be true.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part One
programme.desc: While on vacation, the Ross family finds a girl stranded in the middle of the ocean and invites her aboard their yacht. Meanwhile, Bertram stays home and babysits Mrs. Kipling, who has separation anxiety from Ravi.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Build a Sled?
programme.desc: When Charlotte backs out of their annual “Snowling” tradition for a sleepover with her friends, Cami sets out to sabotage her sister's sleepover.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Good Grade Hunting
programme.desc: Sydney is baffled when she can't seem to get an A in her poetry class, while Young Max easily gets an A. They find out they had the same poetry teacher.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dream Moms
programme.desc: When Booker and Levi get into some trouble backstage at a concert, Raven and Chelsea try to seize the moment to perform with their all-time favorite group La Dee Da.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Date Fright
programme.desc: When Byron and Rachel set out to have an "official" date night, Owen and Blair convince their parents to let them stay home alone without a babysitter for the first time. As the night unfolds, the kids make a series of bad decisions.

programme.title: Jessie: The Telltale Duck
programme.desc: Jessie agrees to accompany Bertram to his high school reunion, so he can show his former classmates how successful he has become.

programme.title: Jessie: Where's Zuri?
programme.desc: Stewart gets a new manny and when he clashes with Jessie she stops the play dates between Zuri and Stewart.

programme.title: Jessie: Spaced Out
programme.desc: Ravi gets an opportunity to go into space with Jessie and the kids as a birthday present. Unfortunately, he gets sick right before the trip and the others go without him.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sweet 16-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Karen throws Maddie a curveball about the day she was born, and she and Liv realize planning their sweet 16 party together may be more complicated than expected.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sleep-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv volunteers to supervise Parker's sleepover in hopes of reconnecting with him once she realizes just how much he's grown while she was away. Meanwhile, Maddie and Willow work on a school project, and Joey and Pete go on a road trip to Pastrami Palace.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Between A Raccoon and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Gwen befriends a group of campers called the "Extreme Team," known for their gutsy outdoor activities. They invite Gwen to hike to Dead Horse Drop, and she accepts.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Welcome to Camp Kikiwaka
programme.desc: The Ross kids arrive at camp, only to discovery that the camp's owner, Gladys, is even scarier than the legendary creature that's rumoured to stalk the grounds. With the help of her sneaky niece Hazel, she's out to get the Ross kids.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Gone Girl
programme.desc: Ravi becomes suspicious when he overhears Xander's plans for his first date with Emma. Meanwhile, Zuri and Jorge set up a secret business selling candy and video games to the campers.

programme.title: Jessie: New York, New Nanny
programme.desc: Jessie accepts a job as a nanny and moves in with the Ross family: Christina, a former supermodel turned business mogul; Morgan, a famous movie director; their four kids Emma, Ravi, Luke and Zuri and their beloved Asian water monitor lizard.

programme.title: Jessie: Used Karma
programme.desc: After Jessie accepts an invitation for lunch with Tony, the building's doorman, Emma offers Jessie unsolicited dating advice she has learned from her stash of teen magazines. Meanwhile, Ravi becomes the target of Luke's practical jokes.

programme.title: Jessie: The Talented Mr. Kipling
programme.desc: Despite being weary of Ravi's seven-foot Asian water monitor lizard, Jessie comes to the lizard's rescue after the head of the condo board attempts to ban him from the building. Meanwhile, Zuri brings home another imaginary friend.

programme.title: Pup Academy: Secrets Unleashed
programme.desc: The Academy is in danger of being revealed to the world.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Big Surprise/ Meet the Beagles
programme.desc: Goofy struggles to keep Minnie's surprise for Mickey's birthday a secret. The Happy Helpers are asked to help a band get back together.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Lemur Play/ How the Dog Park Was Won

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Great Muppet Cook-Off / Animal and the Egg
programme.desc: When the Muppet Babies like Chef's homemade cookies more than Piggy's, she challenges him to a cook-off. Animal learns to be gentle when he catches an egg that falls from its nest.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Saving Ayati/ The Crevice

programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild: Close Calls
programme.desc: From incredible caught-on-tape battles and the closest of calls, to extreme fights for survival and creatures unlike any other.

programme.title: America's National Parks: Grand Canyon: Land of Extremes
programme.desc: Meet one of the Grand Canyon’s feisty residents: the Gila monster.

programme.title: America's National Parks: Saguaro: Super Bloom
programme.desc: The Saguaro National Park is a diverse habitat between heaven and hell with more species than any other desert in North America.

programme.title: America's National Parks: Gates of the Arctic: Life on the River
programme.desc: Bears, moose, wolves live in an endless wilderness in The 'Gates of the Arctic' national park in the North of Alaska.

programme.title: America's National Parks: Yosemite: After The Fire
programme.desc: Yosemite National Park is home to coyotes, black bears, black backed woodpeckers and great gray owls.

programme.title: America's National Parks: Great Smoky Mountains
programme.desc: Take a colorful journey through the seasons of the Great Smoky Mountains National Park.

programme.title: America's National Parks: Yellowstone National Park
programme.desc: Explore America’s first national park in stunning detail.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: US Navy Super Fleet
programme.desc: The world's toughest naval fleet are put to the test as cutting-edge aircraft carriers, combat ships, and amphibious assault vehicles and their crews undergo challenging warfare exercises.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: NASA Under Pressure
programme.desc: When catastrophe strikes Skylab, life on earth is threatened by a space station cratering toward earth, and NASA experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Hell Tower, NYC
programme.desc: A New York City skyscraper that could topple at any moment, a city street that suddenly collapses, and a modern-day crisis at Pisa's Leaning Tower.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Stadium Disaster
programme.desc: A stadium on the brink of collapse, an upside-down bridge, and a massive subway project in crisis are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Stadium Disaster
programme.desc: A stadium on the brink of collapse, an upside-down bridge, and a massive subway project in crisis are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Siberian Lake Serpent and Mystery of the Bosnian Pyramid
programme.desc: For centuries, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: The Yeti
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Flannan Lighthouse and Aleshenka: Russian Mummy
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Chandra Levy
programme.desc: Marcia Clark examines the mysterious death of Chandra Levy, the Washington DC intern who had an alleged affair with United States Congressman, Gary Condit. With no one held accountable for Chandra's brutal murder, Marcia investigates what really happened.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Murder in Treme
programme.desc: In New Orleans, when a woman is slashed to death, the investigation into her murder leads Dets. Chuck Ward and Rob Barrere to a house of horrors, and they discover the killer may be someone they least expected.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: Mother's Day/ Somebody Knows
programme.desc: Detectives hit the streets in search of a 48-year-old woman whose two grown daughters fear she is the victim of foul play.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Lester Street
programme.desc: Toney and his team respond to Memphis's worst mass murder in more than 15 years.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: The Graduate
programme.desc: Detectives search for a talented 30-year-old who vanished on his bicycle, just weeks after earning his second Masters degree.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: World famous prosecutor, Marcia Clark, investigates the bone chilling, unresolved death of toddler Caylee Anthony to see if the beautiful little girl was murdered by her own mother.

programme.title: American Justice: The Monster Inside
programme.desc: In a controversial case, rapist Rex Allen Krebs was found guilty of murder in 2001.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Stranger Things
programme.desc: A woman tells officers her boyfriend once brought her back to life after she was murdered. A purse snatching suspect stops running to eat some chicken strips, and a tarot card reader gets dehydrated.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Caught You, By Surprise
programme.desc: Police officers pursue suspected drug dealers, while Keeley saves a group of partiers from a violent schizophrenic.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The New C
programme.desc: A new informant is willing to give up vital information about dealers in exchange for help with his legal troubles.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Fifty Tons
programme.desc: A local casino's connection to a prostitution ring may give detectives the chance to hurt the cartels.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Show Me the Money
programme.desc: Roly goes undercover to nab a top cocaine and heroin dealer, whose most recent crime involved shooting an officer.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Candyman
programme.desc: A series of controlled buys leads detectives to the house of a local dealer.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Ledger
programme.desc: LPD Narcotics busts a stash house holding cocaine and guns, plus a ledger filled with information that could help end a heavy cocaine operation.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: With a large shipment of heroin about to arrive in Laredo, the LPD team conducts a citywide crackdown of suspected heroin dealers to learn where and when the drugs will arrive.

programme.title: Crime 360: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: Det. Mocello responds to the scene of a suspicious fire in the bedroom of a first-floor apartment. He soon discovers that the deceased victim's charred body has sustained serious trauma.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home after a day spent helping friends move apartments. Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: Events earlier in the day lead to a card game halted by gunfire and a young man's death. Also, when Lt. Joe Kenda responds to a double shooting, he and his team find themselves reminiscing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Married to the Job
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda and his officers are facing off against a barricaded gunman when he gets an emergency call from his wife. Kathy winds up overhearing him being shot at, leading her to grapple with the terrifying realities of being married to a cop.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly. Then, when a college student is strangled in his home, Lt. Kenda must figure out which of his roommates is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Trigger
programme.desc: A sharp-dressed pedestrian is shot in the back for unknown reasons. Chasing a promising lead, Kenda realizes he's barking up the wrong tree. Then when an impromptu argument turns fatal, a suspect's guilt boils down to his skill with deadly weapons.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cradle to the Grave
programme.desc: When a frantic 9-1-1 call reports an infant stopped breathing, Kenda and Walker must see if the daycare is to blame or the parents themselves. Then, Kenda works an execution-style shooting and is shocked to learn the victim is a kindly grandmother.

programme.title: Shattered: One Wrong Turn
programme.desc: In 2005, in a small Florida town, a doting grandmother interrupts the murder of her grandson. As the investigation into it launches, it's revealed that the witnesses know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cradle to the Grave
programme.desc: When a frantic 9-1-1 call reports an infant stopped breathing, Kenda and Walker must see if the daycare is to blame or the parents themselves. Then, Kenda works an execution-style shooting and is shocked to learn the victim is a kindly grandmother.

programme.desc: In 2005, in a small Florida town, a doting grandmother interrupts the murder of her grandson. As the investigation into it launches, it's revealed that the witnesses know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Trigger
programme.desc: A sharp-dressed pedestrian is shot in the back for unknown reasons. Chasing a promising lead, Kenda realizes he's barking up the wrong tree. Then when an impromptu argument turns fatal, a suspect's guilt boils down to his skill with deadly weapons.

programme.title: Homicide City: A Russian Tragedy
programme.desc: When Russian mortgage broker Fay Zonis is found murdered in her office, for seemingly no reason, it sends chills through Philadelphia's Russian-American community. As detectives hone in her killer, the investigation sends shockwaves around the world.

programme.title: Homicide City: Society Hill Slaying
programme.desc: When Philadelphia jewelers Patty and Richard Zimmerman are found executed in their Society Hill townhome, police suspect a robbery gone wrong. But, when they discover nothing has been taken, they realize the motive may be far more sinister.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Murder Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Police find a cast of dangerous characters and uncover a heinous plot in the murder of a single mother.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Killer Chemistry
programme.desc: Professor Tiffany Maher is a faculty favorite; intelligent and sociable, it's hard to believe that she could have any enemies. But when Tiffany is murdered, investigators discover a secret online life that may lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Texts and Threats
programme.desc: After losing his dream girl to an older guy, Seath Jackson launches into a bitter social media war with his ex and her new man. Soon after, Seath disappears. Detectives work to find out if this is a runaway case or something more serious.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: Murder on His Mind
programme.desc: Stephen Stanko is accused of brutal crimes committed in a violent spree so atrocious that it left two people dead and a girl pleading for her life in a desperate 911 call. But Stephen claims that a brain defect propelled him to commit the crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dangerous Beauty
programme.desc: An investigation into death of a Washington man and the trail that leads to Peggy Sue Thomas, a one-time Ms. Washington.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation in Texas
programme.desc: Investigate the death of a businessman with a taste for bondage and the overriding question of whether he was killed by an intruder, someone he loved or by his own hand.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Brother vs. Brother
programme.desc: Two brothers run a lucrative snow removal business. But one of them grows devoted to a spiritual group and its enigmatic guru; while the other finds a more illicit path to enlightenment. The only thing that can stop this family feud is murder.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Suburban Nightmare
programme.desc: A group of suburban teens invite a much-older, rougher young man into their inner circle. They're hoping for thrills and cash. But when these two worlds collide, the crashing result is a murder so vicious and gruesome it haunts the community to this day.

programme.title: Broken Trust: In-Law, Outlaw
programme.desc: A California real estate agent gives in to his wife's wish that her mother moves in with the couple, and their kids. But what begins as a compassionate gesture turns into a bitter war of wills between husband, wife and mother-in-law leading to bloodshed.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Home Protection
programme.desc: Signe Edwards is a true-blue Texan. But when an injury forces her off the saddle, she relies on a series of handymen and sketchy online acquaintances for help around the house. One of them will betray her in the most horrific way.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Past and Present
programme.desc: Many researchers believe we have been visited by otherworldly spacecraft since the dawn of man. Trace the evidence from the history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and through the art of the Renaissance period.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: The idea of ancient astronauts goes back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenged religion and science. Find out who his enemies were, what his influences were, and why he was jailed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Experimental Soldiers
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, the United States of America searches for a way to create a generation of 'Supersoldiers' who use telepathy to win battles. In the 1950s gangster Whitey Bulger volunteers for the CIA's LSD project known as MK-Ultra.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas. Where Mobsters once ruled. Where casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. See why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for atomic bombs and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Experimental Soldiers

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: The idea of ancient astronauts goes back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenged religion and science. Find out who his enemies were, what his influences were, and why he was jailed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Past and Present
programme.desc: Many researchers believe we have been visited by otherworldly spacecraft since the dawn of man. Trace the evidence from the history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and through the art of the Renaissance period.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: For a Greater Cause
programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Christiansburg House
programme.desc: The team travels down the road to Christiansburg to salvage an old home. They get some good meat and potatoes from the house, including the mantles, banisters and all the gingerbread trim. Also, Mike and Tay build a couch that can fit a Whiteside.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former United Methodist Church
programme.desc: The crew head to Laurel, Delaware to salvage what they can from a former Methodist church that fell victim to water damage. The team removes pews, a bronze bell, and a greenhouse skylight before heading back to the shop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former Dixie Furniture Plant
programme.desc: The team travel to a vacant furniture plant in Lexington, NC, where they work in near-darkness salvaging conveyor belts, fire doors, veneer molds, factory carts, and industrial lights.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Texas Tavern Sign
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work at home in Roanoke, Virginia, where they salvage a sign for the Texas Tavern and learn the history of the local restaurant over burgers and bowls of chili.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cosby Brothers Mill
programme.desc: Mike and Robert give Tay a history lesson with an old dentistry x-ray machine before the team loads up for a project in Grottoes, VA. They start at Cosby Brothers Mill where they hope to salvage some old mill parts.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Saving a Gem
programme.desc: The crew finds a gem with a log cabin tucked inside an old farmhouse, but they struggle to disassemble and demo the property due to the ever-increasing mud. They must also meticulously document the placement of each beam, board and panel.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lerner House
programme.desc: The crew travels to Orange, VA to salvage a 1930s brick mansion, including its columns and windows. Mike and Robert return General George C. Marshall's door to the Virginia Military Institute. Tay and Mike build a coffee table from a door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Esther Ludwig Mansion
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage travels to Pennsylvania to save what they can from Esther Ludwig's mansion before it gets demolished. They hope to reclaim some of the mansion's all-original items, such as chandeliers, built-ins and mantles.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Shirley Hates
programme.desc: Paul built his wife Shirley a makeshift deck 10 years ago, but he used cheap materials and the deck is ready for a complete teardown.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Mansion
programme.desc: Brett thinks he finally gets an easy restoration job on a stunning Spanish Colonial hillside mansion until he finds out it has a pink Victorian kitchen. Then he uncovers hidden treasure on the old woodwork but the homeowners don't share his excitement.

programme.title: Restored: Restoring a Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Restoration expert Brett Waterman is hired to restore a 1913 Arts and Crafts bungalow. This 100 year-old home has experienced incomplete renovations and numerous bad choices over the years. Brett rediscovers the home's history and architectural features.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Restored: 1947 Postmodern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1947 postmodern ranch back to its post-World War II style for a military veteran and his wife. However, he has to make some tough decisions when the homeowners want to get rid of the original kitchen tile.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Revival
programme.desc: Brett restores a classic Spanish Colonial Revival that hasn't been touched in years because the owner is a professional musician who is always on the road. He must make the kitchen and bath functional while staying true to the home's character.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1913 craftsman bungalow for a young couple with a baby on the way. He's challenged with finding a way to bring back the natural wood in the house while still making it bright and welcoming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Nicole's doing a surprise home renovation for one of her carpenters, Bobby, and his family. Bobby and Karen started renovating their house two years ago, but their daughter was diagnosed with cancer and they turned their focus to her.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Tessa and her family are coming home soon, and Nicole needs to finish their surprise home renovation before they do. She tackles the laundry room and hallway in the back addition of Bobby and Karen's house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Nicole finds her home in Minnesota to be flooded from burst pipes due to the extreme cold. She and her crew try to discover where all they leak are located in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitschy Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole tackles her grandparents' kitchen. Built in 1956, the kitchen has been around for over half a century, but was redone in the '90s, eliminating its mid-century modern charm. Nicole wants to restore the kitchen to how it looked when she was a child.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Pool Room Refresher
programme.desc: For Nicole's next project, it's gonna be sink or swim! The indoor pool that Nicole's grandfather built by hand is getting a much-needed refresher. First up, the safety and mechanical systems of the pool need to be overhauled.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: All About Family
programme.desc: Off the pool lies a dated family room, covered in wood paneling and boasting a large mechanical room for the pool equipment. Nicole sees opportunity for a beautiful bathroom, and an updated, retro family room.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Authentic In Athens
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in one of the coolest college towns in the country, Athens, Ga., to find the best breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Atl Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan has just one day to find Atlanta's best deals for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Birmingham Magic
programme.desc: Ali Khan has 12 hours and 35 bucks to find the best deals in Birmingham.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Sin City Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan is on the hunt for breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits an old San Antonio institution given new life by their phenomenal bacon and blue cheese burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City Of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Roger meets two talented chefs who own two spectacular outdoor cooking rigs.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swords and Spits
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking visits chefs using unusual tools over live fires. In Georgia, Roger meets Erik Niel, a chef that loves to break out of his butcher shop to cook outdoors.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Local Legends
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 15 of America's best dishes that have achieved local legend status. From sentimental favorites like deep-dish pizza, patty melts and spaghetti and meatballs to an old-fashioned clambake and lobster roll.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.desc: Hiro and Fred enlist Karmi to find out what Liv Amara is doing to cure Orso Knox, the man who was mysteriously turned into a monster.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Push, Pull, Pogo
programme.desc: Jack tries to deliver mail on a pogo stick, Markiplier takes on a boss battle in Cuphead, Dan swallows up scenery in Donut County, and Muselk attempts a new Fortnite challenge.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Slime and Pirates!
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War Part I: The Night of De Spell
programme.desc: After the family falls apart, Magica preys on a vulnerable Scrooge to finally acquire his Lucky Dime.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War Part II: The Day of the Ducks!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: The Day Without Spider-Man
programme.desc: The Bloodgem accidentally reawakens Gwen Stacy's dormant spider-powers which turns her into Ghost Spider!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Impatient Patient
programme.desc: Even though he is clearly sick, Hiro refuses to listen to Baymax or his teammates and insists that he should not stay on the sidelines during a battle with the Mad Jacks.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Bull’seye! Archer Hercules!
programme.desc: While Aiger is excited to face off against his friend, Hae-jin is torn between Blading and archery.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: A Haunted House for Everyone!
programme.desc: Harper and Sarah are excited to visit a haunted house, and they end up having a bit too much fun!

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty

programme.title: Room 104
programme.desc: Room 104 tells a different story about the characters who stay in this hotel room.

programme.title: Movie: Glass
programme.desc: A man with multiple personalities, including one with superhuman strength and a brutal nature, joins forces with a super-genius to reveal to the world that comic book villains are real, but they're opposed by a loving father with incredible strength.

programme.title: His Dark Materials
programme.desc: Two children wander throughout exciting and dangerous parallel universes.

programme.title: Movie: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Having returned from fighting in the Crusades, Robin Hood turns to thievery as a way of rebelling against the tyrannical Sheriff of Nottingham. With the help of his Merry Men, he comes up with a daring plan to empty the Sheriff's own treasury.

programme.title: Silicon Valley
programme.desc: A comic look at the modern-day epicenter of the high-tech gold rush.

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Helen Mirren portrays Catherine the Great in the latter years of her reign.

programme.title: Mrs. Fletcher
programme.desc: A middle-aged divorcee experiences a sexual reawakening.

programme.title: Any One of Us
programme.desc: This film chronicles pro mountain biker Paul Basagoitia's life-changing journey to recovery after suffering a spinal cord injury.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Liberty: Mother of Exiles
programme.desc: This documentary follows legendary fashion designer Diane von Furstenberg in her quest to discover how Statue of Liberty sculptor Auguste Bartholdi's dream became a reality and what the statue means to people around the world.

programme.title: Movie: Nine Months
programme.desc: A child psychiatrist panics when his girlfriend announces that she is pregnant.

programme.title: Movie: The Ring Two
programme.desc: In this terrifying sequel, Rachel tries to save her son by digging into the past of Samara, the spirit of a drowned young girl who is trying to take over her son's body.

programme.title: We Are Not Done Yet
programme.desc: Ten U.S. military veterans of varied backgrounds come together at a poetry workshop to work through their traumatic pasts through the art of written word.

programme.title: Movie: Head Full of Honey

programme.title: His Dark Materials
programme.desc: Two children wander throughout exciting and dangerous parallel universes.

programme.title: Movie: The Rundown
programme.desc: A bounty hunter teams up with a mob boss's son in order to retrieve a legendary artifact.

programme.title: Movie: The Apollo
programme.desc: Learn the history of Harlem's famous Apollo Theater, New York City.

programme.title: Movie: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.title: Catherine the Great

programme.title: Room 104

programme.title: Mrs. Fletcher
programme.desc: A middle-aged divorcee experiences a sexual reawakening.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Death Day

programme.title: Watchmen
programme.desc: Conflicted, damaged superheroes navigate a dystopian future.

programme.title: Movie: Judge Dredd
programme.desc: A member of an all-powerful, futuristic police force is framed for murder by his brother.

programme.title: Movie: Boy Erased
programme.desc: After a teen is outed against his will to his devout parents, he's sent to a gay conversion therapy program. As he increasingly butts heads with the head therapist, his parents struggle to reconcile their faith and love for their son with his sexuality.

programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at how a movie or show is made.

programme.title: Movie: A Good Woman

programme.title: Movie: Slow Burn
programme.desc: A mayoral candidate uncovers a web of corruption when his girlfriend is accused of murder.

programme.title: Movie: The Nun

programme.title: Movie: Black Swan
programme.desc: After winning the lead role in 'Swan Lake,' a ballet dancer begins to lose her mind and becomes more suited for the role of the Black Swan.

programme.title: Movie: The Mule

programme.title: Movie: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: A San Francisco police inspector must track down a dangerous sniper who is terrorizing the city.

programme.desc: An elite hit man teaches his trade to the son of one of his previous victims. While in pursuit of a target, deceptions create trouble for their partnership.

programme.title: 100%: Julian Edelman

programme.title: Sid and Judy

programme.title: Movie: Gattaca

programme.title: Movie: Killing Hasselhoff

programme.title: Movie: Congo

programme.title: Movie: The Patriot
programme.desc: A pacifist is drawn into the American War of Independence against his will in order to protect his enlisted son.

programme.title: Movie: Wreck-It Ralph
programme.desc: A video game villain creates havoc for the arcade he lives in, when he decides to become a hero.

programme.title: Movie: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time
programme.desc: A rogue prince and a princess race to keep an ancient dagger safe from dark forces. The dagger, a gift from the Gods, would allow its possessor to reverse time and rule the world.

programme.title: Movie: McFarland, USA

programme.title: Movie: Killer Elite

programme.title: Movie: Sicario: Day of the Soldado

programme.title: Movie: The Exorcism of Molly Hartley

programme.title: Movie: Carlito's Way
programme.desc: Upon his release, a former convict tries to avoid the corrupting influences of his old life.

programme.title: Movie: Leap Year

programme.title: Movie: Wreck-It Ralph
programme.desc: A video game villain creates havoc for the arcade he lives in, when he decides to become a hero.

programme.title: Movie: Nostalgic Christmas
