programme.desc: Syndicated radio talk show host Todd Schnitt gives us his unique perspective on the biggest news stories of the day.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A trip to the hair salon resulted in the plaintiff feeling dreadful about the job done to her hair.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Joyce's Choices
programme.desc: Joyce makes Vince crazy with jealousy when she agrees to have dinner with her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Mom: Pork Loin and a Beat-up Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Christy competes with her classmates for a prestigious internship, and Bonnie babysits Tammy following her oral surgery.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Look at Me, Mommy, I'm Pretty
programme.desc: Alan plans Evelyn's wedding while Charlie pursues his future stepsister.

programme.title: Black-ish: Charlie in Charge
programme.desc: While Dre and Bow take Zoey on a trip to visit Bow's alma mater, Brown University, Dre battles with his fear of flying through a little pharmaceutical assistance to get him through the flight.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pilot
programme.desc: Dre, an advertising exec, is happily anticipating a promotion at work, which would make him the firm's first African American senior vice president. Rainbow, an anesthesiologist, is looking forward to Dre's raise.

programme.title: Riverdale: Chapter Sixty-Three: Hereditary
programme.desc: Archie turns to an unexpected ally for help. Jughead uncovers a mystery surrounding the author of the Baxter Brothers books. Betty confronts Charles about his past. Veronica deals with a major shake-up at home. Cheryl and Toni get unexpected visitors.

programme.title: Nancy Drew: The Mystery of Blackwood Lodge
programme.desc: While trying to uncover the truth about a long-buried history between Lucy Sable and Ryan Hudson, Nancy finds herself in the curious position of having to strike a deal with Horseshoe Bay’s newest and most suspect widower.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Jam
programme.desc: Phoebe is stalked by a young man who has mistaken her for her twin sister, Ursula.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Summer of George
programme.desc: George comes into some unexpected money and dreams of having a relaxing vacation.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike's Manifold Destiny
programme.desc: Mike learns a lesson after his car breaks down, and he's forced to decide whether or not to accept a loan from Carl to fix it.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Fish in a Drawer
programme.desc: A CSI team investigates a mysterious death at Charlie's house.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Lame Gretzky
programme.desc: Even though he is terrible, Adam tries his best at ice hockey and hopes to impress Murray. Likewise, Murray works hard to show he enjoys watching Adam make home movies. Meanwhile, Beverly drives Erica crazy about her S.A.T.'s.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Revenge O' the Nerds
programme.desc: With the children growing up, Beverly decides to reinvent herself and quits being a substitute teacher. She decides to focus her energy on going to night school so she can eventually own her own business.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Big Hole
programme.desc: Han fires Caroline after she insults his diner and Max tries to mend their relationship.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: God Bless the Girl That's Got Her Own
programme.desc: Melanie gives temporary shelter to a Sunbeam whose boyfriend has left her high and dry.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: House of Tutor
programme.desc: After Mike encourages Vanessa to branch out her tutoring business, she takes his advice but gets frustrated when he gets a little too involved. Meanwhile, Kyle is determined to be like the other Baxters and become a high-powered entrepreneur.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: A panel of professional comics interact with contestants for cash prizes.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Woods vs. Brooks
programme.desc: A Bride-to-be brings her fiancée and the alleged other woman to court to find out the extent of their 'friends with benefits' relationship.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross
programme.desc: Former judge Kevin Ross presides over various small claims cases in the courtroom.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean
programme.desc: Judge Mablean Ephriam handles justice her way.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Smitth vs. Laster/ Hicks
programme.desc: After their son and brother’s sudden death two women came forward claiming he fathered a child with each of them. They will get to the bottom of this paternity saga in Lauren Lake’s Court.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett
programme.desc: Judge Glenda Hatchett presides over court cases.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The Plaintiff is suing her son’s ex-girlfriend because she kicked her car in a fit of rage, and says she has the video to prove it. The ex-girlfriend claims she is being overcharged for the car damages.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Being a bad gumshoe; what a hot head; I need water.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean
programme.desc: Judge Mablean Ephriam handles justice her way.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A relationship went bad and the plaintiff is suing her ex-boyfriend for money she claims she spent on vacations and car repairs.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: Outragous Results
programme.desc: Cornell has doubts that his son with Raleesha is actually his child. Then, Stephanie's mom claims that her cousin Shawna could be her half-sister, but Stephanie's father denies the possibility altogether.

programme.title: Maury: Man to Man... Stop Denying My Teen Daughter's Baby
programme.desc: A woman is fed up with being walked all over and is demanding her son's father now step up and take responsibility for their child.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Transsexual Sex Confessions
programme.desc: Ty says his fantasy has quickly turned into a nightmare that he can’t wake up from fast enough! He cheated on his girlfriend Bri, with a transgendered woman named Kendra.

programme.title: Movie: Everybody Wants to Be Italian
programme.desc: A man and a woman pretend to be Italian to win each other's affection.

programme.title: Movie: Deliver Us From Eva
programme.desc: An uptight woman constantly meddles in the affairs of her sisters and their husbands.

programme.title: Movie: MacGruber
programme.desc: A former special op agent is called into action to stop his arch nemesis from using a nuclear warhead to destroy Washington.

programme.title: Movie: BlacKkKlansman
programme.desc: A rookie detective is the first black police officer in his city's history, and it doesn't take long for him to tackle an incredible case: infiltrating the Ku Klux Klan. While he leads the investigation, he recruits a white detective to help.

programme.title: Movie: Search Party
programme.desc: Hijinks and misadventures abound when a young man's two best friends step up to rescue him after a carjacking and reunite him with his wayward bride-to-be.

programme.title: Movie: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Four friends face the promise and pitfalls of life in the 1990s when they share a house.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Ever Forgive Me?
programme.desc: After her style of writing falls out of favour, a biographer finds herself broke and out of work. She beings forging letters by famous people and selling them, but when potential buyers begin to get suspicious she turns to stealing actual letters.

programme.title: My Favorite Shapes by Julio Torres
programme.desc: Comedian Julio Torres examines his favorite shapes, which include a plexiglass square, an oval he wishes were a circle, a self-conscious cactus, and a Ferrero Rocher chocolate.

programme.title: Movie: A Handful of Dust

programme.title: Movie: A Midsummer Night's Sex Comedy
programme.desc: Married couples find themselves in emotional and sexual entanglements.

programme.title: Movie: Down to You
programme.desc: A man finds the girl of his dreams only to discover that she is not ready for commitment.

programme.title: Movie: Joe Somebody
programme.desc: An unassertive single dad revamps his image after he is beaten up by the office bully.

programme.title: Movie: Thank You for Smoking
programme.desc: A spokesman for the tobacco companies tries to be a role model for his 12-year-old son while putting a positive spin on cigarettes.

programme.title: Movie: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: A Greek girl falls in love with a non-Greek man, which creates havoc amongst her family.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins

programme.title: Movie: Supernova
programme.desc: A deep space medical rescue team must fight an alien that is planning to destroy the universe.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Enemy Mine
programme.desc: Daniel attempts to negotiate an agreement with a territorial tribe of Unas when they attack an SGC mining team.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Space Race
programme.desc: The SG-1 negotiates with the Hebrudans, who have the technology they are interested in.

programme.title: Babylon V: Survivors
programme.desc: Garabaldi is falsely accused of sabotaging a new construction site aboard B5.

programme.title: Babylon V: By Any Means Necessary
programme.desc: Loading dock workers violently demand more pay.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: New Lease
programme.desc: Dr. James Houghton is killed during a mugging. Dr. Charles McCamber uses an invention that he co-created with Houghton to bring his colleague back to life.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: Double Helix
programme.desc: Since Dr. Martin Nodel is the most brilliant geneticist in the world, the students and staff at the university are willing to put up with a few eccentricities -- unlike his son Paul, who gets impatient with his father's behavior.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: Dead Man's Switch
programme.desc: A loner is recruited by the Army to spend a year buried below the Arctic tundra.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: Sixth Finger
programme.desc: A scientist, guilty over his contribution to the atomic bomb, hides out in a small town.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis: Reunion
programme.desc: Satedan survivors find Ronon and invite him to join them, but doing so would mean leaving Atlantis.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis: Doppelganger
programme.desc: During an exploratory walk on a jungle planet, Lt. Col Sheppard touches a glowing crystalline growth and unwittingly becomes host to an infectious energy form.
